text: Been coming here since 4 months now. The pool is perfect size for beginners, I enjoy alot here. The pool staff is super friendly and helpful especially sir mudassar. He taught me how to swim, he was very helpful and supportive i learned swimming within a week, my experience here has been AMAZING so far. Overall staff is also very friendly I love hanging out with them they’re very fun people!! The ambiance and cleanliness is also a 10/10. Recently joined the gym aswell and i love it here.

I’ve been training at Jacked for 4 months now, and hands down, it’s the best gym in Islamabad! The equipment is top-notch, and the staff is super helpful. The cleanliness is always on point, and the overall vibe of the gym makes it such a motivating place to work out. I also love that they offer a separate time for ladies, ensuring total privacy for women. Although it would be best if they had extended hours for women, however, I’ve never had any issues in my 4 months here. Highly recommend this gym to anyone looking for a great fitness experience within a budget!

I began swimming three months ago with no prior experience. I was fortunate to meet Sir Muddasir, a humble and educated instructor. His technique and calm behavior made my swimming journey amazing. As a beginner, he created an environment that boosted my confidence, enabling me to swim on my own. He taught me various techniques and water safety skills. I am happy to have learned from him. Please note that the ladies' shower room and lighting require attention and maintenance. The front desk staff is very helpful and kind. I recommend everyone join, as it is a safe and good facility.

We come to the pool to relax and chill in the warm water but instead we’re greeted with cold water and sickness. The management is absolutely terrible there is no temperature control whatsoever and it’s a very chilly season so this should be controlled and cold water should be avoided.

Excellent gym with well-maintained machines and a clean atmosphere. Trainers are professional and supportive, always ready to help. The environment keeps you motivated, whether you’re a beginner or experienced. Totally worth it!

My sister and I were guided by Miss Ayesha at the Jacked fitness gym to take a three-month swimming package after being clearly told that the membership could be frozen anytime. Based on this assurance, we paid for the deal. I only attended for three days due to college and school, but when I requested a one-month freeze, it was refused, and new conditions (valid only for February) were mentioned which were never disclosed at the time of purchase. Neither a freeze nor a refund was offered, despite minimal usage. This feels misleading and unprofessional, and I hope the management ensures clearer communication and fair treatment of customers. I request either a refund or a proper freeze of my unused month.

Me and my sister were clearly promised by Miss Ayesha at Jacked Fitness Gym that the three-month swimming package could be frozen anytime, which is why we paid for it. After attending for only three days due to college and school, my request for a one-month freeze was flatly denied, and completely new rules (only valid for February) were suddenly invented—rules that were never mentioned at the time of purchase. Despite almost zero usage, the gym refused both a freeze and a refund. This is misleading, dishonest, and highly unprofessional behavior. Changing terms after taking payment is unacceptable. I demand either a full refund or a proper freeze of my unused month.

As my little one was always so damn scared of even stepping into pool but the man is really professional and I saw my son enjoying independent swimming with so much confidence in a month... They were so happy with the sir as he was humble and supportive with them and they were not ready to learn from anyone else in town. Whoever wants him as a coach won't regret... Highly recommended!
